classification.classificationNote: XAUt is treated as a tokenized commodity-backed gold token. It should be graded with the commodity_backed profile because custody, vaulting, reserve attestation, legal terms, and redemption evidence are central. Custody evidence remains a data gap until verified from official Tether Gold documents or reserve reports.

metadata.sourceReliabilityNote: Institutional fields are primarily from RWA.xyz secondary data because official Tether Gold legal pages are JavaScript-rendered in automated fetches. Verify against official legal/terms/fees pages before production grading.
metadata.directPurchaseMinimumDescription: RWA.xyz states direct purchase from Tether Gold verified users requires a minimum of 50 fine troy oz of gold, i.e. 50 XAUt tokens, and lists Min. Investment as 200,000 USD.
metadata.regulatoryFrameworkCandidate: El Salvador Digital Asset Law (LEAD); CNAD - El Salvador National Commission of Digital Assets
dataGaps: Official legal structure requires manual verification from Tether Gold legal and terms pages.
Official custodian or vault operator has not been verified in this dataset.
Latest reserve report date, URL, and full reserve breakdown require manual verification.
No explicit on-chain proof-of-reserves oracle address has been verified.

_meta.sourceTier: mixed official, explorer, and secondary aggregator sources
_meta.notes: Migrated to the Nexus RWA classification-first standard. XAUt is commodity-backed, but legal structure and custodian evidence remain blockers until official documents are manually verified.
